content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Trust Based Mobility: Video Editing Specialist (Direct-Response / AI Video Editor) Anywhere in the World Wyoming Design Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://eddieron.com">https://eddieron.com</a> </p> <p>Trust Based Mobility is a performance-driven health and wellness brand that helps people move better, feel better, and regain confidence in their bodies. We produce high-volume direct-response video content for paid social and organic channels, and we're building a team of rockstar editors to help us ship 100+ video assets per week without sacrificing quality, speed, or storytelling.</p> <p>This is not a slow, academic editing role. It's a high-output creative role for a fast, organized, performance-minded editor who can turn raw ideas, scripts, AI-generated footage, voiceovers, hooks, and direct-response frameworks into ads that feel native, polished, and conversion-focused. You'll work closely with the Head of Performance Creative.</p> <p>Compensation is paid in USD: $1,500 to $3,000 per month base depending on experience, plus bonus potential up to $4,000 per month for A+ performance. This is a 1099 contractor, fully remote role. It begins with a 60-day paid trial, after which successful candidates become eligible for bonus compensation and paid time off. Our team runs on PST and we require at least 4 hours of daily overlap.</p> <p>What you'll do: edit and assemble performance-focused video ads for paid social and other growth channels; work from creative briefs, scripts, raw footage, AI-generated clips, voiceovers, and brand guidelines; build strong hooks, maintain pacing, and add accurate captions with no grammar mistakes; select music and sound effects, incorporate B-roll and AI-generated footage, and ensure every asset feels cohesive from hook to CTA; and maintain a clean editing workflow, meet deadlines, and communicate proactively.</p> <p>Required: fluent in at least one major editing workflow (Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or comparable); fluent, near-native English is mandatory, with accurate captions and comfort on team calls; AI-capable, able to build full AI-generated video ads using tools and models such as Veo 3, Kling 3.0, Seedance, and similar; comfortable creating voiceovers with tools like ElevenLabs and stitching AI scenes, voiceover, subtitles, graphics, and music into one harmonious edit; a solid understanding of direct-response video (hooks, pacing, captions, CTAs); e-commerce, direct-to-consumer, or digital product editing experience strongly preferred (not generic dropshipping content); and a clear, organized portfolio with playable video links.</p> <p>Nice to have: familiarity with project management tools like Notion, Monday.com, or ClickUp and Slack, plus an understanding of performance creative testing, Meta ads, TikTok-style pacing, and UGC structures. To apply, include a link to your portfolio with playable video links. Applications with broken links, unplayable files, or no portfolio will not be considered.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trust-based-mobility-video-editing-specialist-direct-response-ai-video-editor">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trust-based-mobility-video-editing-specialist-direct-response-ai-video-editor</a></p> Thu, 23 Jul 2026 20:03:19 +0000 Sat, 22 Aug 2026 20:03:19 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trust-based-mobility-video-editing-specialist-direct-response-ai-video-editor https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/trust-based-mobility-video-editing-specialist-direct-response-ai-video-editor Nuuly: Nuuly Senior Software Engineer Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Pennsylvania Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5983/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Philadelphia, PA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.nuuly.com/">https://www.nuuly.com/</a> </p> <p></p> <p>Nuuly is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to join our Technology team. Building performant scalable cloud service environments is hard. Nuuly knows this firsthand, having built a cloud-based microservices platform from the ground up to power our online customer experience and drive the logistics and processing of our garment distribution centers. We're looking for a Senior Engineer with the initiative and expertise to help mature this platform into a stable, scalable, and robust backbone for launching the next wave of Nuuly innovations.</p> <p>You'll need strong experience designing and building microservices backed by relational and non-relational databases. Solid confidence with JVM-based tools such as Kotlin, Spring, and data persistence with Postgres and other database technologies. You’ll also need a reasonable amount of aptitude in designing and integrating Kubernetes services with cloud-based platform APIs such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AWS, or Azure focused on driving toward zero-downtime deployments.</p> <p>As a Senior Engineer, you'll bring experience that extends beyond personal code contribution: leading design for moderately complex features, driving communication between teams, providing critical feedback, coordinating with others, and providing mentorship as needed. You'll participate in incident response and post-mortem processes to improve system reliability. You should be adept at picking up new technologies and patterns and comfortable discussing and debating the pros and cons of various approaches. Most of all, you should be ready and willing to tackle new challenges with a supportive team of creative and hard-working professionals.</p> <p>Responsibilities:</p> <p></p> <ul> <li>Producing architectural proposals and engaging in discussions and decision-making for new features and platform evolution</li> <li>Collaborating with the product team to design solutions for stakeholder features and inform product decisions through technical feasibility analysis</li> <li>Mentoring junior engineers through code review, pair programming, and design discussions</li> <li>Delivering the whole lifecycle of deployable features: design, code, testing, configuration, documentation, deployment, and support</li> <li>Contributing to operational guidelines, system reliability practices, and post-mortem analysis for production incidents</li> <li>Teaching and enforcing development methodologies while proactively identifying improvement opportunities in codebase, tooling, and processes</li> <li>Collaborating with QA and Platform Engineering teams to test code and keep our integrated testing environments unblocked</li> <li>Providing technical guidance to cross-functional teams on integration approaches and system constraints to deliver features and evolve our architecture</li> </ul> <p>Qualifications:</p> <p></p> <ul> <li>5-7 years of software engineering experience with ~2 years of senior-level responsibilities such as taking ownership of designs or projects and working to coordinate work across teams</li> <li>Operational knowledge of one or more server-side object-oriented programming languages (Java, Kotlin, Scala, or other JVM languages preferred; Python, Go, Node/TypeScript also considered)</li> &l
